verified_ok.claim: browser payload is constrained to ui_action plus structured account_id
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py rejects unsupported fields before command execution
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/scripts/overview.js account action click sends account_id through maybeConfirmAndRun

verified_ok.claim: promote and demote lifecycle actions preflight accounts list before execution
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py runs accounts list --json before account action args are admitted
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py asserts accounts list precedes accounts promote
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py asserts accounts list precedes accounts demote

verified_ok.claim: promote eligibility is reserve, not manual hold, not retired
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py checks retired pool before lifecycle execution
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py checks promote target pool equals reserve
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py rejects promote when manual_hold is true

verified_ok.claim: demote eligibility is active, not manual hold, not retired
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py checks retired pool before lifecycle execution
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py checks demote target pool equals active
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py rejects demote when manual_hold is true

verified_ok.claim: post-action truth is refreshed from canonical accounts JSON rather than optimistic local state
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/scripts/overview.js refreshes live readonly source after post_action_refresh_required

verified_ok.claim: adapter allowlist uses exact argv templates

findings_adjudicated.finding: dirty worktree contains runtime.py changes outside the UI contour
findings_adjudicated.adjudication: not introduced by this contour and not staged for this contour; remains explicitly excluded and deferred to WORKTREE_TAIL_ADJUDICATION

gaps.item: no real-browser E2E run for promote/demote
gaps.adjudication: accepted for this bounded gate because unit/static/HTTP harness tests prove command boundaries; full browser operator flow is scheduled for UI_WEB_END_TO_END_OPERATOR_FLOW

gaps.item: unrelated external lab dirty files remain in worktree
gaps.adjudication: excluded from this contour and not staged
